atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports concerns about blood pressure and heart failure.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports traveling a lot recently, particularly hiking in northern cascades.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports watching her sodium intake.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports her blood pressure has been difficult to manage.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports attending therapy weekly since her last annual exam.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any chest pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any shortness of breath.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some nasal congestion from fall pollen and allergies.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor finds the patient's blood pressure elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A three out of six systolic ejection murmur is heard on heart exam.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: One plus pitting edema is noted in the lower extremities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's echocardiogram shows a low-ish pumping function of her heart at 45%.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's lipid panel from last year was slightly high.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has high blood pressure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has congestive heart failure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has depression

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking medication for her heart failure

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking lisinopril 40mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is taking lasix 20mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient should record their blood pressures every day

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient should send their blood pressures to the doctor

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient should take their blood pressure medication as directed

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient should follow up in four weeks if symptoms persist

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An echocardiogram will be ordered

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor wants to schedule a mammogram
